testcase.name: test_set_preferred_days_invalid_day

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 400/422 for invalid day, got 200 assert 200 in (400, 422) + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_calendar_features.py:68: in test_set_preferred_days_invalid_day assert r.status_code in (400, 422), f"Expected 400/422 for invalid day, got {r.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 400/422 for invalid day, got 200 E assert 200 in (400, 422) E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_events_on_preferred_days

failure.message: AssertionError: Events on wrong days (expected Mon/Wed/Fri): ['2026-03-31 (Tuesday)'] assert 1 == 0 + where 1 = len(['2026-03-31 (Tuesday)'])

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_calendar_features.py:128: in test_events_on_preferred_days assert len(bad_events) == 0, f"Events on wrong days (expected Mon/Wed/Fri): {bad_events[:5]}" E AssertionError: Events on wrong days (expected Mon/Wed/Fri): ['2026-03-31 (Tuesday)'] E assert 1 == 0 E + where 1 = len(['2026-03-31 (Tuesday)'])

testcase.name: test_intake_saves_preferred_days
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_calendar_features.py:273: in test_intake_saves_preferred_days assert r.status_code in (200, 201), f"Expected 200/201, got {r.status_code}: {r.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200/201, got 422: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","experience"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"userId":"fresh_user_c","goal":"hypertrophy","trainingStyle":"hypertrophy","experienceLevel":"beginner","frequency":3,"preferredDays":["monday","thursday","saturday"],"equipment":["barbell","dumbbell"],"injuries":[],"gender":"male","units":"metric"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 in (200, 201) E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_calendar_events_on_3_preferred_days

failure.message: AssertionError: Events on wrong days (expected Mon/Thu/Sat): ['2026-03-31 (Tuesday)', '2026-04-03 (Friday)', '2026-04-07 (Tuesday)', '2026-04-10 (Friday)', '2026-04-14 (Tuesday)'] assert 15 == 0 + where 15 = len(['2026-03-31 (Tuesday)', '2026-04-03 (Friday)', '2026-04-07 (Tuesday)', '2026-04-10 (Friday)', '2026-04-14 (Tuesday)', '2026-04-17 (Friday)', ...])

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_calendar_features.py:313: in test_calendar_events_on_3_preferred_days assert len(bad) == 0, f"Events on wrong days (expected Mon/Thu/Sat): {bad[:5]}" E AssertionError: Events on wrong days (expected Mon/Thu/Sat): ['2026-03-31 (Tuesday)', '2026-04-03 (Friday)', '2026-04-07 (Tuesday)', '2026-04-10 (Friday)', '2026-04-14 (Tuesday)'] E assert 15 == 0 E + where 15 = len(['2026-03-31 (Tuesday)', '2026-04-03 (Friday)', '2026-04-07 (Tuesday)', '2026-04-10 (Friday)', '2026-04-14 (Tuesday)', '2026-04-17 (Friday)', ...])
